zh.lifeSummary: Sarah Welles是Capt. John Welles Jr.和Mary Hollister的女兒，於1673年11月2日出生在美國康乃狄克州費艾費爾德史達科特。她於大約1687年與John Everitt在美國紐約州朗 易曼德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1729年5月在美國紐約州紐約市昆斯朗 易曼德 希迪享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sarah Welles是Capt. John Welles Jr.和Mary Hollister的女儿，于1673年11月2日出生在美国康涅狄格州費艾費爾德史達科特。她于大约1687年与John Everitt在美国纽约州朗 易曼德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1729年5月在美国纽约州紐約市昆斯朗 易曼德 希迪享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries 1683: Queens, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Queens, New York, United States 1898: Borough of Queens, New York, United States

en.lifeSummary: Sarah Welles was born on 2 November 1673, in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, United States as the daughter of Capt. John Welles Jr. and Mary Hollister. She married John Everitt about 1687, in Long Island, New York, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about May 1729, in Long Island City, Queens, New York City, New York, United States, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Sarah Welles est née le 2 novembre 1673, à Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, États-Unis, fille de Capt. John Welles Jr. et Mary Hollister. Elle a épousé John Everitt environ 1687, à Long Island, New York, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ mai 1729, à Long Island City, Queens, New York City, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sarah Welles wurde am 2. November 1673 in Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten, als Tochter von Capt. John Welles Jr. und Mary Hollister geboren. Sie hat um 1687 in Long Island, New York, Vereinigte Staaten John Everitt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um Mai 1729 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Long Island City, Queens, New York City, New York, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Sarah Welles è nata il il 2 novembre 1673 nel Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America come figlia di Capt. John Welles Jr. e Mary Hollister. Lei sposato John Everitt circa 1687, nel Long Island, New York, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa maggio 1729, nel Long Island City, Queens, New York City, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Wellesは1673年11月2日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ファイルフィールドストラトフォードでCapt. John Welles Jr.とMary Hollisterの娘として生まれた。約1687年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ロング イスランドでJohn Everittと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1729年5月にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ニュー ヨーク シトイクイーンスロング イスランド シトイで55歳で死去した。

ko.Jamaica, Queens, New York City, New York: 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티 퀸스 자메이카

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Welles(은)는 1673년 11월 2일 미국 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드에서 Capt. John Welles Jr.(와)과 Mary Hollister의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1687년 미국 뉴욕 주 론그 이슬랜드에서 John Everitt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1729년 5월 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티 퀸스 론그 이슬랜드 시티에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sarah Welles nasceu em 2 de novembro de 1673, em Stratford, Fairfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América filha de Capt. John Welles Jr. e Mary Hollister. Ela casou-se com John Everitt aproximadamente 1687, em Long Island, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente maio de 1729, em Long Island City, Queens, New York City, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sarah Welles родилась 2 ноября 1673 г. в местности стратфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. Её родителей звали Capt. John Welles Jr. и Mary Hollister. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Everitt около 1687 г. в местности лонг исланд, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около май 1729 г. в местности лонг исланд сити, куинс, Нью-Йорк, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sarah Welles nació el 2 de noviembre de 1673, en Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos como hija de Capt. John Welles Jr. y Mary Hollister. Se casó con John Everitt aproximadamente 1687, en Long Island, Nueva York, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente mayo de 1729, en Long Island City, Queens, Nueva York, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 55 años.
